data.body: REBASE + FIXES pushed. (A) EPIC: fixed 905 real failure — tests/integration/test_reconcile_live_e2e.py had its own by-path loader _recon() still pointing at old acli_subprocess.py root path (runtime load, so collection didn't catch it; it's in tests/integration/ top-level, outside subagent coverage). Fixed _recon to resolve the 8 relocated modules from adapters/jira; amended into S5. Rebased whole 5-change stack onto origin/main (was 11 behind, clean rebase); docs/env-vars.md clean at both S4+S5 trees post-rebase. Re-validated: reconciler+config+module-size 1385 pass, integration+interfaces 1478 pass. Pushed rebased stack -> changes 900-903,905 new patchsets (Change-Ids preserved). 903's earlier fail was an UNRELATED flake (test_overlap_retrieve perf budget, rebar-debug proven). (B) FLAKY FIX: bug 5e94 claimed; test_overlap_retrieve.test_perf changed single-sample->best-of-5 min (robust to CI contention, teeth retained: sustained stall->RED proven). Pushed standalone change 911. Monitor bskfup26f watches all 6. NEXT: gates green -> submit 911 + close 5e94; submit epic stack + close S1-S5 + epic bbf1.
